description: Create a psychology research survey in LimeSurvey titled 'Social Media Use and Psychological Well-Being Study 2024' using the credentials admin/Admin123!. Configure the survey with the description 'IRB Protocol #2024-PSY-0847 — Principal Investigator: Dr. Sarah Mitchell, Department of Psychology' and the end URL 'https://sampleuniversity.edu/research/participation-credit'. The welcome message must include a complete informed consent statement covering the study purpose, voluntary participation, withdrawal rights, minimal risks, anonymity, and contact info for Dr. Sarah Mitchell (smitchell@sampleuniversity.edu) and the IRB (irb@sampleuniversity.edu). The end message must provide a debriefing statement explaining the study hypothesis and the PI's contact information. Set the survey to group-by-group format with the progress bar enabled, the back button disabled, and anonymized responses enabled. The survey structure must include three groups: 'Informed Consent' (containing one mandatory agreement question), 'Social Media Usage' (containing at least two questions about habits), and 'Psychological Well-Being' (containing at least two questions adapted from the WHO-5 index). Activate the survey upon completion.
